结节病.summary: 肺结节病可进展为纤维化、气道病变和肺动脉高压，诊断需综合病理与影像，治疗用激素和免疫抑制剂，并关注慢性曲霉菌病等并发症。

结节病.title: Composite Inflammatory Indices for the Differentiation of Tuberculosis, Sarcoidosis, and Reactive Lymphadenopathy in Patients Undergoing EBUS-TBNA.
结节病.authors: Kerget B, Cetin SM, Coskuner MB
结节病.summary: SICI和PICI新炎症指标可有效区分结核性、结节病和反应性纵隔淋巴结肿大。

结节病.title: The Diagnostic Course of Sarcoidosis: A Population-Based Study Highlighting Risk Factors for a Delay in Diagnosis.
结节病.authors: Hagner MD, Miller A, De la Serna S, Arakkal A, Cavanaugh J, Pezzulo A, Hamzeh N, Polgreen P, Gerke A
结节病.summary: 基于人群的研究显示，结节病诊断延迟常见，56%患者在确诊前已有症状相似的就诊经历。

结节病.title: Outcomes of Lung Transplantation for Pulmonary Sarcoidosis Across Multiple Eras: A 25-Year Experience from a US Center.
结节病.authors: Kattih Z, Chandel A, Khangoora V, Wilkinson J, Nyquist A, Singhal A, Thomas C, Kilaru S, King C, Shlobin O, Nathan S, Aryal S
结节病.summary: 美国25年数据表明，肺结节病肺移植患者生存率随时间改善，但慢性移植肺功能障碍仍是主要挑战。

ILD.title: Izalontamab brengitecan (Iza-bren; BL-B01D1), a first-in-class EGFR-HER3 bispecific antibody-drug conjugate, for patients with EGFR-mutated NSCLC: pooled analysis of phase I and phase II trials.

ILD.summary: 免疫检查点抑制剂相关肺炎虽罕见但致命，需及时识别，高风险人群包括曾接受胸部放疗或间质性肺病者。

ILD.summary: 肌炎综合征中特定皮肤表现与自身抗体及间质性肺病和恶性肿瘤风险相关。
